text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's finally time for the Japanese Oaks. My
anticipation's through the roof because I was
featured in a crazy exciting promo video!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's unlike any video that's been done before!
There's no questioning that I'm today's heroine!
The title of Queen of the Oaks is miiine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The girl who wants to be a princess and one of
the boys that bullied her are here to support me
too! I'm overcome with emotion!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Could the day that I become Princess Fighter be
close at hand?! Princess☆Vital Strike! Fan these
embers into flames!
